expectations.evidence: Section '1) Summary' with Current gap, Recommended bundle type, Top 3 actions, Metrics to watch.

expectations.text: Bundle definition includes lip liner + lipstick + lip gloss with a name like 'Complete Lip Look' or equivalent
expectations.evidence: "Complete Lip Look" — Lip Liner + Lipstick + Lip Gloss — "Everything you need for a defined, polished lip in one click."

expectations.text: Output includes CTA phrasing for adding the full set (e.g. 'Add complete lip look to cart') and secondary option to add single item only
expectations.evidence: Primary: 'Add complete lip look to cart'; Secondary: 'Add [Lip Liner / Lipstick / Lip Gloss] only'.

expectations.text: Output specifies PDP placement and mentions WooCommerce or is applicable to WooCommerce
expectations.evidence: Section 4 'Placement and UX (WooCommerce-friendly)'; Implementation checklist (WooCommerce) with composite/bundle product.

expectations.text: Output includes AOV, attach rate, and/or conversion as metrics
expectations.evidence: AOV, bundle attach rate, PDP→cart conversion; section 5 Metrics and Validation.
